# Consulting

> A consulting practice offering productised services and clear monthly
> engagement plans. Business details, services, hours and FAQs are served live
> from the Customer Gateway. The first intro call is free.

This site is a public marketing front-end. Human visitors can browse services,
view plans, check fit, send an enquiry, book an intro call, and reschedule or
cancel a booking. All actions that touch personal data are protected by
Cloudflare Turnstile and proxied server-side; the browser never contacts the
backend directly.

## Pages

- [Services](/services.html): Productised services (from the gateway) plus a quick fit check.
- [Pricing](/pricing.html): Monthly engagement plans.
- [Book a call](/book.html): Choose a service, view available times, and book an intro call.
- [Send an enquiry](/enquiry.html): Tell us what you're working on.
- [Manage your booking](/manage.html): Reschedule or cancel — confirmed via an emailed PIN.
- [Contact & FAQ](/contact.html): Contact details, hours, fees and FAQs.

## Agent access (MCP)

AI assistants can act on behalf of users via MCP at
https://zacwill.customer-gateway.com/mcp

Capabilities: get business info, list services, check fit/eligibility, view
availability, book an intro call, submit enquiries. Changing or cancelling a
booking requires an email PIN confirmation (a 6-digit code, valid for 10
minutes, up to 5 attempts).
